title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Boerum Hill, Brooklyn
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Boerum Hill, Brooklyn. Safe, humane bat control for historic brownstones and residential buildings. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Boerum Hill's beautiful historic brownstones and multi-family residences provide ideal roosting spots for bats seeking shelter in Brooklyn. Our professional bat removal and exclusion services protect your Boerum Hill property from bat infestations while ensuring humane, legal treatment of these protected mammals. We specialize in permanent solutions that keep bats out for good.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has over 15 years of experience serving Boerum Hill residents with safe, effective bat removal services. Our certified technicians understand the unique challenges of Brooklyn's historic architecture and use proven exclusion methods that preserve your property's integrity while ensuring complete bat removal.
localContext: Boerum Hill's tree-lined streets and proximity to the Gowanus Canal create an environment where bats often seek refuge in the attics, chimneys, and eaves of the neighborhood's iconic 19th-century brownstones and townhouses. The area's mix of single-family homes and converted multi-unit buildings near Atlantic Avenue and Smith Street requires specialized bat exclusion techniques that respect the architectural heritage of this historic Brooklyn neighborhood.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Boerum Hill?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Boerum Hill typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, number of entry points, and the complexity of your building's structure. Historic brownstones may require additional care to preserve architectural details. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are bats common in Boerum Hill brownstones?
faqs.answer: Yes, bats are frequently found in Boerum Hill's historic brownstones and townhouses. These older buildings often have small gaps in rooflines, chimneys, and ventilation systems that provide ideal entry points. Bats are attracted to the quiet attic spaces and can enter through openings as small as 3/8 of an inch.

faqs.question: Is bat removal humane and legal in Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Bats are protected in New York State, and we follow all legal requirements for humane bat exclusion. We never harm or relocate bats; instead, we use one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to leave naturally but prevent re-entry. All work is performed outside of maternity season (June-July) to ensure no young bats are trapped inside.

faqs.question: How long does the bat exclusion process take?
faqs.answer: The complete bat exclusion process typically takes 2-4 weeks in Boerum Hill homes. After our initial inspection, we seal all potential entry points except the primary exits, install one-way exclusion devices, and monitor to ensure all bats have left. Once we confirm the bats are gone, we seal the final entry points and provide cleanup services if needed, including attic decontamination and insulation replacement.
